dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses Bollinger Bands as volatility bands. Entry conditions capture: (1) price touching/penetrating bands (close crosses bb_upper/bb_lower), (2) price retracing toward midline (close moving back toward bb_middle), (3) volume confirmation on pullback (vol_ratio_20). Exit conditions set stops beyond the touched band and targets at band midline. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because the signal trades in the direction opposite to the band touch (fade/reversion). Long entries when price pulls back from upper band toward middle; short entries when price pulls back from lower band toward middle.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses Bollinger Bands as volatility bands. Entry conditions capture: (1) price touching/penetrating bands (close crosses bb_upper/bb_lower), (2) price retracing toward midline (close moving back toward bb_middle), (3) volume confirmation on pullback (vol_ratio_20). Exit conditions set stops beyond the touched band and targets at band midline. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because the signal trades in the direction opposite to the band touch (fade/reversion). Long entries when price pulls back from upper band toward middle; short entries when price pulls back from lower band toward middle.

source_rule_text: Enter a reversion trade when price has extended beyond a volatility band; execute the trade as price pulls back toward the band's center, trading in the direction of the original band touch.
